response.justification: Bogdan possesses over 15 years of software engineering experience, an MIT Computer Science degree, and a commendable background in full-stack development and open-source entrepreneurship. However, this Director-level Principal role requires deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy, machine learning, and cloud platform architecture. Bogdan's AI experience appears limited to a very recent role, falling short of the advanced strategic advisory and AI product leadership required for this position.
strengths: Exceeds the 15-year minimum experience requirement in software engineering.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive as the founder of an open-source platform (GISCollective).
Proven ability to share insights and inspire others through technical workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks the deep, recognized industry expertise in AI and Machine Learning required for a strategic AI role.
Background is primarily in hands-on Senior/Staff full-stack engineering rather than Director-level strategic advisory.
Does not possess the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field.
